title: AMD Just Got a Potential AI Heavyweight Customer. Here’s The New Price Target
excerpt: A surprise addition to AMD's AI customer roster has analysts scrambling to revise their price targets, and the chipmaker's upcoming July event could determin...
content_html:
Vandita Jadeja

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 8:30 AM CDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • AMD carries a BUY target of $563, with Anthropic potentially joining Microsoft, OpenAI, Meta, and Oracle as confirmed GPU customers.

  • NVIDIA dominates with 92% Data Center growth and a P/E of 41, while Intel's $4 billion restructuring leaves AMD's GPU momentum unchallenged.

  • AMD's trailing P/E of 186 leaves shares exposed if the July 22 event disappoints or China export controls tighten further.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and AMD didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The AI infrastructure land grab has a new potential domino. Jefferies analysts flagged Anthropic as a likely next AMD customer announcement, with the chipmaker's Advancing AI 2026 event set for July 22 to 23. That joins a customer roster reading like a who's who of AI, forcing a fresh look at where the stock can go.

Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) is $562.88, pointing to 13.54% upside from the current $495.76. The recommendation is buy, with confidence at 90%.

24/7 Wall St. Price Target Summary

A Rally That Just Paused

AMD is up 131.49% year to date and 209.06% over the past year, but shares have cooled 11.14% in the past week after touching a 52-week high of $584.73.

Q1 2026 delivered: revenue of $10.25 billion, up 37.9% year over year, with non-GAAP EPS of $1.37 beating the $1.29 consensus. Data Center revenue jumped 57% to $5.78 billion, and management guided Q2 revenue to roughly $11.2 billion, or about 46% growth. The July 22 event has retail excited: Reddit sentiment sits at bullish score of 72.

Why Bulls See a Breakout Ahead

The bull case rests on customer breadth. Microsoft is confirmed as an MI400 series customer, OpenAI has committed to 6 gigawatts of AMD GPUs, Meta is deploying up to 6 GW of Instinct GPUs starting with custom MI450-based silicon, and Oracle is building a 50,000-GPU Helios supercluster.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and AMD didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Add Anthropic and AMD's estimate that its AI CPU addressable market exceeds $200 billion starts to feel conservative. In the bull scenario, shares could reach $629.03 within 12 months, a 26.88% return. CEO Lisa Su reinforced that trajectory, noting "customer engagement around MI450 Series and Helios is strengthening, with leading customer forecasts exceeding our initial expectations."

content_html_zh:
万迪塔·贾德贾

2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一上午 8:30 CDT 阅读 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • AMD 的买入目标为 563 美元，Anthropic 可能会加入微软、OpenAI、Meta 和 Oracle 的行列，成为已确认的 GPU 客户。
  • NVIDIA 以 92% 的数据中心增长率和 41 倍的市盈率占据主导地位，而英特尔 40 亿美元的重组让 AMD 的 GPU 势头无可匹敌。
  • 如果 7 月 22 日的事件令人失望或中国出口管制进一步收紧，AMD 的往绩市盈率为 186 倍，那么其股价将面临风险。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 AMD 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

人工智能基础设施抢占新的潜在多米诺骨牌。 Jefferies 分析师将 Anthropic 标记为可能的下一个 AMD 客户公告，该芯片制造商的 Advancing AI 2026 活动定于 7 月 22 日至 23 日举行。 这与像人工智能名人录一样的客户名册一起阅读，迫使我们重新审视股票的走势。

我们对 AMD（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）的 24/7 华尔街目标价为 562.88 美元，较目前的 495.76 美元上涨 13.54%。 推荐买入，置信度为 90%。

24/7 华尔街价格目标摘要

刚刚暂停的集会

AMD 今年迄今上涨了 131.49%，过去一年上涨了 209.06%，但股价在触及 52 周高点 584.73 美元后，过去一周下跌了 11.14%。

2026 年第一季度业绩：营收 102.5 亿美元，同比增长 37.9%，非 GAAP 每股收益 1.37 美元，超出市场预期 1.29 美元。 数据中心收入跃升 57%，达到 57.8 亿美元，管理层指导第二季度收入约为 112 亿美元，增长约 46%。 7 月 22 日的活动让零售界兴奋不已：Reddit 情绪看涨分数为 72。

为什么多头看到未来突破

牛市取决于客户的广度。 微软被确认为 MI400 系列客户，OpenAI 已承诺使用 6 GW 的 AMD GPU，Meta 正在部署高达 6 GW 的 Instinct GPU，从基于 MI450 的定制芯片开始，Oracle 正在构建一个 50,000 个 GPU 的 Helios 超级集群。

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 AMD 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

再加上 Anthropic 和 AMD 对其 AI CPU 潜在市场超过 2000 亿美元的估计，开始显得保守。 在牛市情况下，股价可能在 12 个月内达到 629.03 美元，回报率为 26.88%。 首席执行官 Lisa Su 强调了这一趋势，并指出“围绕 MI450 系列和 Helios 的客户参与度正在加强，领先的客户预测超出了我们最初的预期。”
